1.content:
Meredith Grey just finished her medical exam in Boston and moved to Seattle to get her first job assignment as assistance doctor in Seattle Grace Hospital. Also she grown up in Seattle and so can return to her hometown and also take care of her mother, who is suffering from Alzheimer.
Her mother was a well known and very respected surgeon.
Our fanfiction as well as the real TV show starts on the morning, where she has her first day at the new job. She had a one night stand with a handsome guy. She only knew his name, Derek, but what more you need to know from a one night stand. They met in a bar the night before and had some drinks together and so one thing was leading to another.
But now she has to get rid of him and rush to the hospital to not be late for on her first day.
1.title: start

11.content: A short while later, Meredith leaves her car and catches up with the other group of new interns at Seattle Grace Hospital. The Chief concludes his tour by saying that the next seven years will be the best and worst of their lives.
11.title: arrive in time

111.content:
In the locker room, Meredith meets the other interns. One of them is Cristina Yang, an Asian looking woman. They discover that they have the same resident, Bailey or "The Nazi". Not only Meredith and Christina wonder why their resident has such a name!
While Meredith and Christina chat, some of the male interns breaks their conversation, just starting to introduce himself as George O'Malley. He talks nervously and tells Meredith that they met last night. He describes what she was wearing but quickly stops when he realizes they think he is gay. George is happy that his introduction is stopped by the call to now meet their resident, Bailey, they so called Nazi. Meredith, Christina and George as well as the other interns have mixed emotions about what and who they will meet now: Walking up to Bailey, they are shocked to see she is a woman (and not a nazi either). And the perverted part of this is that Baily is a black woman…
Some of the interns, some very attractive girl called Isobel suggests that the nickname may be professional jealousy. Cristina scoffs but nevertheless, Isobel introduces herself to Bailey, telling her that she is Isobel Stevens but that everyone calls her Izzie. Bailey ignores the introduction, shows them their equipment, gives them a short tour and tells them her rules. She then receives a page and she and the interns run onto the roof. On the roof, a chopper lands and gives details on the patient: Some woman is having seizures. In the hospital, the interns and nurses inject the patient, who is called Katie some sedation, so that she finally stops moving. Another doctor walks in and describes her as a wet fish on dry land. He then orders them to do all the basic tests. George is work ups, Cristina is to do labs, Meredith is assigned to Katie Bryce and to get her a CT. Izzie is ordered to perform rectal exams by a smiling Bailey.
111.title: more with her

1112.content: While on the patient George tries to perform a simple procedure on her, he becomes nervous, since now everything he learned in theory is so real, but he can do it, only he is a little bit slow, maybe on too much thinking. The arrogant black doctor from earlier, who called poor Katie wet fish on dry land is getting tiresome and pushes confused George out of the way and does it himself. George then jokingly says that Mr. perfect himself probably messed up a lot at first too. Through gritted teeth,the still unknown doctor smiles and tells George hes going to have fun with him, George gulps.
1112.title: who is the arrogant doctor?

choices: Derrick Shappard, her one night stand...who is working here
who is the nazi talking to
11123.content:
Meanwhile Meredith is lost in the hospital with Katie continuously talking about the beauty pageant she's missing and how she was great at it other than when she fell over doing rhythmic gymnastics and occasionally stopping to tell Meredith that she is lost.
This Katie is getting pretty much on Meredith nerves and she is happy as she found the CT room finally and while inside the machine Katie is not allowed to talk…
The pictures are done and Meredith has to bring Katie to her room, where her parents are already waiting and waiting for answers. Of course they ask Meredith, who is just a little bit overloaded now and says she finds the doctor, who will talk to them soon.
She runs to Baily to ask for advise, but Baily, who is in a conversation, so she is guided to….
11123.title: more in the CT

111231.content: It was a normal working day, no real suprises planned or expected as Derreck was called to a council for a new patient, who was brought in with the choppter some moments ago. He had checked the CT pictures and had to share the results with the parents of the poor young lady. Now he was on the way to his patient remembering that there was an internal announcement that some new interns will start today. Derrek was curious what and who he will meet as he directly bumped into one of them and both of them got a kind of shock moment, it was the girl from last night from the bar and the one he had spend the night with…How embarrassing….
111231.title: Derrick Shappard, her one night stand...who is ...

113.content: I was just done with my medical studies and today was my first day as an intern at the famous Seattle Grace hospital and together with some other new starts we were listing to the opening speech of the chief
113.title: the other interns

14.content:
A short while later, Derrek had also left her house and went to his car, some crappy old Jepp.
He made his way to the Seattle Grace Hospital, where he is working as a brain surgery leading doctor.
14.title: what about this Derek guy
